Title: Verify API returns a 200 response for a valid tracking number
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request to the API with a valid tracking number.
Expected Result: Response status code is 200, and the full history of the delivery is returned.

Title: Verify API returns a valid response body format (JSON/XML)
Test Steps:
1. Send a GET request to the API with a valid tracking number.
2. Check response format.
Expected Result: Response body is in JSON format.

Title: Verify the API handles missing tracking numbers gracefully
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request to the API without a tracking number.
Expected Result: Response status code is 404 with an appropriate error message: "Not Found."

Title: Verify API returns 404 for invalid tracking numbers
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request to the API with an invalid tracking number
Expected Result: Response status code is 404 with error: "No delivery matched the given tracking number."

Title: Verify API response includes all required fields
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request to the API with a valid tracking number.
Expected Result: Response body includes CurrentStatus, TrackingNumber, TrackingURL, SupportPhoneNumbers, and TransitEvents.

Title: Verify the Content-Type header works with different formats
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request with Content-Type: application/json and Content-Type: text/xml.
Expected Result: Response status matches the requested Content-Type format.

Title: Verify the Accept header works with different response formats
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request with Accept: application/json and Accept: application/xml.
Expected Result: Response format matches the Accept header value.

Title: Verify error handling for server issues
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a server issue.
2. Send a GET request to the API.
Expected Result: Response status code is 500 with an appropriate error message: "Internal Server Error."

Title: Verify API response with missing mandatory headers
Test Steps: 1. Send a GET request without the X-Requested-By or Accept headers.
Expected Result: Response status code is 400 or appropriate error indicating missing headers.
